items.title: AI Projects
items.description: I collaborate on AI-driven projects including predictive modeling, computer vision, and intelligent systems. Open to research, product development, and real-world applications.

items.title: Software & Web Development
items.description: Available for building scalable web applications, backend systems, and full-stack solutions with a focus on performance, clean architecture, and user experience.

items.title: Robotics & Embedded Systems
items.description: Interested in developing robotics systems, humanoid applications, and embedded solutions combining hardware and AI technologies.

items.title: Startup & Business
items.description: Open to collaborating with startups and businesses on innovative projects, product development, and technology strategy to drive growth and success.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.description: Providing consulting on system architecture, AI integration, and technology strategy to help businesses build efficient and scalable solutions.

items.title: Education & Mentorship
items.description: Passionate about sharing knowledge through mentoring, workshops, and training in programming, AI, and software development.
